name: A Para Transit Group
principals: Sundeep Kumar (President), Mandeep Kumar, Reena Kumar (siblings; founded by their father in 1979)
service_types: paratransit, special-needs transportation, medical, some student/school transport
districts_or_customers: East Bay Paratransit Consortium; San Leandro/Alameda County paratransit; medical and rehab transport; school/work trips for special needs riders
recent_news: Acquired $3.8M East Bay facility via SBA 504 loan (TMC Financing case study); cited as high-tech paratransit operator with 110-vehicle fleet; second-generation family business
fit_notes: Independent, multi-generational Bay Area paratransit operator with ~110 vehicles - adjacency to special-needs student transport makes it a marginal Summit fit; primarily ADA paratransit rather than yellow-bus K-12, so fit is limited unless Summit wants West Coast SPED/NEMT capability.

name: First Class Medical Trnsprtn

recent_news: No M&A, growth, or safety news found; appears as a small Yellow Pages listing only
fit_notes: Micro NEMT/ambulance operator in Fresno with no evidence of school-bus or student-transportation contracts; does not appear to be a viable Summit tuck-in target.
